description: Style Note Crafted from a soft cotton fabric that wicks sweat away and offers exemplary dry comfort all day, this T-shirt from nike is a perfect combination of comfort and sport and is sure to become a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with jeans and sneakers and jet set to take on the world in style or pair it with shorts or tracks while sweating it out in the gym or on the field. Product Details Green polo T-shirt, has a ribbed cutaway collar, embroidered yellow floral detail on the left chest, two button placket, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs and a vented hemline where the back hemline is longer than the front Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash cold Tumble dry low Use cool iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
